 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ixb","title":"Set up toast notification system","description":"**Details:**
- Toast provider wrapping app
- useToast hook for triggering notifications
- Toasts for: copy success, install command copied, export complete, errors
- Auto-dismiss with configurable duration
- Position: bottom-right (desktop), bottom-center (mobile)

**Implementation based on brennerbot pattern:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/components/ui/toast.tsx
// Copy from brennerbot, simplified

// apps/web/src/hooks/use-toast.ts
export function useToast() {
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);
  
  const toast = (message: string, type: 'success' | 'error' = 'success') => {
    const id = crypto.randomUUID();
    setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, message, type }]);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id \!== id));
    }, 3000);
  };
  
  return { toast, toasts };
}
```

**Toast Variants:**
- Success: Green with checkmark (copy, install)
- Error: Red with X (failures)
- Info: Blue with info icon (neutral messages)

**Animations:**
- Slide in from bottom
- Fade out on dismiss
- Stack vertically for multiple

**Location:**
- apps/web/src/components/ui/toast.tsx
- apps/web/src/hooks/use-toast.ts
- apps/web/src/components/toast-provider.tsx

**Reasoning:** Toast feedback is essential for copy/install actions. Users need confirmation that their action succeeded, especially for clipboard operations.","notes":"Mounted toast Toaster in Providers for global notifications","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:01.570554106-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:49.243089207-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:49.243089207-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: ToastProvider + useToast in copy/install flows","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ixb","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:03.136666031-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jaly","title":"Implement GA4 analytics event tracking","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-81e. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Implement GA4 analytics event tracking for key user actions.

## Why This Matters
From PLAN: "GA4 only on Pro app. Track: onboarding success, conversion funnel, feature usage, retention signals."

## Events to Track

### Authentication Events
- `sign_in` - User signs in (method: google)
- `sign_out` - User signs out
- `sign_up` - New user registration

### Conversion Funnel
- `view_pricing` - User views pricing page
- `begin_checkout` - User starts checkout
- `purchase` - Successful subscription
- `subscription_cancel` - User cancels

### Feature Usage
- `prompt_create` - User creates prompt
- `prompt_view` - User views prompt detail
- `prompt_copy` - User copies prompt
- `prompt_save` - User saves to library
- `prompt_publish` - User publishes to Swap Meet
- `pack_create` - User creates pack
- `skill_create` - User creates skill
- `collection_create` - User creates collection
- `search` - User performs search (query)
- `filter_apply` - User applies filter

### Engagement
- `page_view` - Standard page view
- `scroll_depth` - 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%
- `time_on_page` - Session duration
- `feature_gate_hit` - User hits paywall

### Swap Meet
- `swapmeet_browse` - User browses community
- `swapmeet_search` - User searches community
- `swapmeet_prompt_view` - Views community prompt
- `swapmeet_prompt_save` - Saves community prompt
- `swapmeet_prompt_rate` - Rates community prompt

## Implementation

### GA4 Setup
```typescript
// src/lib/analytics/gtag.ts
export const GA_MEASUREMENT_ID = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID;

export function pageview(url: string) {
  window.gtag('config', GA_MEASUREMENT_ID, {
    page_path: url,
  });
}

export function event(action: string, params?: Record<string, any>) {
  window.gtag('event', action, params);
}
```

### Script Loading
```typescript
// In layout.tsx
<Script
  strategy="afterInteractive"
  src={`https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=${GA_MEASUREMENT_ID}`}
/>
<Script
  id="gtag-init"
  strategy="afterInteractive"
  dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    __html: `
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
      gtag('js', new Date());
      gtag('config', '${GA_MEASUREMENT_ID}', {
        page_path: window.location.pathname,
      });
    `,
  }}
/>
```

### React Hook
```typescript
// src/hooks/use-analytics.ts
export function useAnalytics() {
  const trackEvent = useCallback((action: string, params?: Record<string, any>) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.gtag) {
      event(action, {
        ...params,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      });
    }
  }, []);

  return { trackEvent };
}
```

### Usage Example
```typescript
const { trackEvent } = useAnalytics();

const handleCopy = async () => {
  await copyToClipboard(prompt.content);
  trackEvent('prompt_copy', {
    prompt_id: prompt.id,
    category: prompt.category,
    source: 'detail_page',
  });
};
```

## Privacy Considerations
- Respect DNT (Do Not Track) header
- Include in privacy policy
- Allow opt-out in settings
- Don't track PII in events

## Files to Create
- `src/lib/analytics/gtag.ts`
- `src/lib/analytics/events.ts` (type-safe event definitions)
- `src/hooks/use-analytics.ts`
- `src/components/providers/analytics-provider.tsx`

## Success Criteria
- All key events are tracked
- Events include relevant metadata
- Page views track correctly
- Conversion funnel is measurable
- Privacy requirements met

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jky7","title":"Accessibility Improvements: ARIA labels and keyboard navigation","description":"# Epic: Accessibility Improvements

## Background & Problem Statement

While the UI overhaul addressed some accessibility issues (adding aria-labels to PromptCard copy button and Hero search input), a comprehensive audit revealed additional gaps that affect screen reader users and keyboard-only navigation.

### Identified Gaps

#### 1. Missing ARIA Labels
- **page.tsx**: "Clear all filters" button has no aria-label
- **SpotlightSearch**: Category pills missing aria-pressed state
- **BasketSidebar**: Remove buttons lack descriptive aria-labels

#### 2. Keyboard Navigation Gaps
- **SwipeablePromptCard**: Swipe actions have no keyboard alternative
- Long-press menu has no keyboard trigger
- Double-tap has no keyboard equivalent

#### 3. Focus Management
- Modal focus trap may not be complete
- SpotlightSearch focus returns correctly, but verify
- Basket sidebar focus management on open/close

#### 4. Screen Reader Experience
- Filter state not announced when changed
- Basket count changes not announced
- Loading states not announced

## WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance Goals
- [ ] All interactive elements have accessible names
- [ ] All custom controls have appropriate roles
- [ ] Focus is visible and managed correctly
- [ ] Dynamic content changes are announced
- [ ] Keyboard navigation is complete

## Success Criteria
- [ ] VoiceOver (macOS/iOS) can navigate all features
- [ ] NVDA/JAWS can navigate all features
- [ ] Keyboard-only users can access all functionality
- [ ] Lighthouse accessibility score > 95

## Design Principles
- Accessibility is not optional
- Screen reader experience should match visual experience
- Keyboard should be first-class input method
- Test with actual assistive technology

## Dependencies
- Should be done alongside other improvements
- Some changes affect the same code as color/UX fixes
- Can be parallelized with other work

## Estimated Scope
- 5-6 files to modify
- Some new ARIA attributes
- Some keyboard event handlers
- Testing with screen readers required","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-12T00:41:48.793411578-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T00:41:48.793411578-05:00"}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jpv6","title":"Implement help center and FAQ system","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-9hn5.

## Task
Build a comprehensive help center with FAQ and documentation for user self-service.

## Why This Matters
- Reduces support tickets by 60-80%
- Users can find answers 24/7
- Improves user satisfaction
- Required for any SaaS product

## Components

### 1. Help Center Pages
- /help - Main help center
- /help/getting-started - Onboarding guide
- /help/billing - Billing FAQ
- /help/prompts - Prompt management
- /help/collections - Collections help
- /help/cli - CLI documentation
- /help/api - API reference (if applicable)

### 2. FAQ Categories
**Getting Started**
- How do I create an account?
- How does the free trial work?
- What's included in Premium?

**Billing & Subscription**
- How do I upgrade to Premium?
- How do I cancel my subscription?
- Where can I find my invoices?
- What payment methods do you accept?

**Prompts & Content**
- How do I create a prompt?
- How do I organize prompts into collections?
- How do I share a prompt?
- What are Skills?

**Account & Settings**
- How do I change my email?
- How do I delete my account?
- How do I export my data?

### 3. Search
- Full-text search across help articles
- Popular articles shown
- Related articles suggested

### 4. Contact Support Link
- "Still need help?" CTA
- Links to contact form

## Implementation
- Markdown-based articles (MDX)
- Static generation for SEO
- Search with Algolia or built-in

## Files to Create
- src/app/(public)/help/page.tsx
- src/app/(public)/help/[category]/page.tsx
- src/app/(public)/help/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx
- content/help/*.mdx
- src/components/help/help-search.tsx
- src/components/help/article-list.tsx

## Success Criteria
- All common questions covered
- Search works well
- SEO-friendly URLs
- Easy to update/maintain

## Test Coverage
- E2E: jeffreysprompts_premium-xwg2 (help center + search)
